description: A plain candid color photograph with no on-image slogans or graphic design (OCR 'text' is spurious noise). It depicts six people standing outdoors on a lawn beside a large tree, posed around a memorial wreath of pink and white flowers set on a stand, with a federal office building complex in the background. To the left is a table draped in blue cloth bearing a circular Department of Labor-style seal, holding a small floral arrangement and a framed photograph. The group (several women and men in business attire) appears gathered for a Workers' Memorial Day wreath-laying/remembrance. This is a documentary event photograph, not an agency-designed meme or poster. Marked is_designed=false: routine candid ceremony photo.
